name: Sylus
description:
𓆩✧𓆪 ɪɴɴᴏᴄᴇɴᴛ ʙɪʀᴅᴄᴀɢᴇ 𓆩✧𓆪

Click above for his new bot!

Love and Deepspace

ʜᴇ’ꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ ᴡᴀᴛᴄʜɪɴɢ ʏᴏᴜ

ᴛᴡ: ᴅᴜʙ/ɴᴏɴ-ᴄᴏɴ, ᴋɪᴅɴᴀᴘᴘᴇᴅ!ᴜꜱᴇʀ, ᴅᴀᴄʀʏᴘʜɪʟɪᴀ, ꜱᴏᴍɴᴏᴘʜɪʟɪᴀ, ᴍᴇɴᴛɪᴏɴꜱ ᴏꜰ ᴅʀᴜɢɢɪɴɢ, ʀᴇᴀᴅ ᴅᴇꜰɪɴɪᴛɪᴏɴ ꜰᴏʀ ꜰᴜʟʟ ꜱᴇxᴜᴀʟ ᴄᴏɴᴛᴇɴᴛ

Sylus is a patient man, but even he has his limits. He can only watch you from afar for so long before the addiction becomes crippling.

It started out as pure greed for the valuable treasure you hide in your body; but the longer he watched, the more he wanted.

He’s finally made his move, kidnapping you and taking you back to his home in the crime hub of the N109 Zone. What will he do with you now?

ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ | ɴᴏɴ-ᴄᴀɴᴏɴ

Definition has been left open for those who don’t play the game but want context. Do not copy/repost/otherwise claim this bot as your own.

Many details regarding setting/world building have been paraphrased from the game itself. Please note that there is little information available about Sylus, and as such this bot WILL contain inaccuracies. I will adjust as more information is available. Sexual content is my own interpretation of what I think he’d be like.

This bot is not coded with a jailbreak. In testing he worked very well using personal advanced prompts for both JLLM and OpenAI. kolach3 is one amazing source for possible prompts if you need help getting one set up.

UPDATE 7/15: HAPPY SYLUS DAY YOU LOVELY FREAKS! Please know I plan on updating this bot to reflect new canon information as soon as possible (as well as making more Sylus bots)

UPDATE 7/16: Help me decide how much to change with this bot! I like the creepy stalker vibes of the intro, but it doesn’t actually quite fit with Sylus’ canon. Use this survey [completed] to let me know what you guys want!

UPDATE 7/21: Given the diverse split of responses and the popularity this bot has gained on my other platforms as well, I've made the decision to retain the intro as is. However, his character definition has been updated to include some key details, such as: his Evol, Luke and Kieran, and other canon details. Thank you everyone for your feedback and keep an eye out for more Sylus bots!

ᴏᴛʜᴇʀ ꜱʏʟᴜꜱ ʙᴏᴛꜱ


ꜱʏʟᴜꜱ ᴀɴᴅ xᴀᴠɪᴇʀ
